idea-plugin.name: Claude Standby
idea-plugin.description:
A native JetBrains cockpit for the claude-standby command-line tool.

Inspect the current workspace, schedule a Claude Code resume, cancel pending work, inspect logs, run diagnostics, and check for CLI updates without leaving the IDE.

The plugin is a thin UI adapter. Scheduling and state changes always go through the installed CLI, so terminal and IDE users share the same engine and task state.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.9.6

  • Initial JetBrains Platform release.
  • Native tool window for status, scheduling, cancellation, logs, diagnostics, and CLI update checks.
  • Configurable CLI executable path with safe argument-vector execution.
